description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a dark hip roof and light-colored exterior walls, surrounded by a low boundary wall and landscaped with palm trees and flowering shrubs. The front facade features large windows, a prominent entryway with a covered porch, and a driveway leading to a double garage. The house has a clean, geometric design with a mix of horizontal and vertical window arrangements, providing ample natural light. The landscaping includes green lawns and decorative plants, enhancing the curb appeal. The driveway and pathways are paved, and the property is set back from the street, offering privacy. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, suitable for an upscale suburban neighborhood.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark hip roof, large windows, and landscaped surroundings, featuring a double garage and a prominent entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, landscaped yard, and driveway leading to the garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, boundary wall, and additional landscaping with palm trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, secondary building structure, and paved driveway.
description_view_3: Street-facing view with a clear look at the double garage, main entrance, and lush front yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent covered entryway with wide steps, large glass door, and minimalistic overhang
